title: Front Office Manager - SOTC Travel - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - SOTC Travel - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, SOTC Travel in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SOTC Travel:
SOTC Travel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SOTC Travel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
